decisions.description: Select between Job Type and Skills competencies
decisions.name: Competency_Category
decisions.label: Competency Category

decisions.description: At least one row from the Job Roles data table has been selected
decisions.name: Job_Roles_s_Selected
decisions.label: Job Roles(s) Selected

decisions.description: At least one row from the Skills(OR) data table has been selected
decisions.name: Skill_s_OR_Selected
decisions.label: Skill(s) (OR) Selected

decisions.description: At least one row from the Skills(AND) data table has been selected
decisions.name: Skills_AND_Selected
decisions.label: Skills (AND) Selected

Flow.description: Configure following competency bundles on a shift 1) Job Role (OR) - Custom 2) Skills (OR) - Custom 3) Skills (AND) - OOTB

formulas.description: Id of custom Job Role Bundle if specified otherwise selected pre-defined Job Role Bundle
formulas.name: jobRoleBundleId

formulas.description: Id of custom Skills (AND) Bundle if specified otherwise selected pre-defined Skills (AND) Bundle
formulas.name: skillsAndBundleId

formulas.description: Id of custom Skills (OR) Bundle if specified otherwise selected pre-defined Skills (OR) Bundle
formulas.name: skillsOrBundleId

Flow.label: Configure Shift Bundles

loops.description: Assign inserted bundles (with Ids) to correct bundle
loops.name: Assign_Bundles
loops.label: Assign Bundles

loops.description: Create a list of Job Type competencies and a separate list of Skills competencies. This is more performant than two separate Get Records elements.
loops.name: Split_Competencies
loops.label: Split Competencies

loops.description: Separate pre-defined bundles into role bundles and skill bundles
loops.name: Split_Pre_Defined_Bundles
loops.label: Split Pre-Defined Bundles

recordLookups.description: Get Job Type and Skills competencies used to populate the shift's competency bundles
recordLookups.name: Get_Competencies
recordLookups.label: Get Competencies

screens.description: Required to force "Finish" button to be displayed allowing screen to be closed gracefully
screens.name: Finish_Screen
screens.label: Finish Screen

fields.name: FlowFinished
fields.fieldText: Shift bundles have been updated successfully

validationRule.errorMessage: Skills (AND) Bundle and Skills (OR) Bundle must be different.

variables.description: Competency bundle for job roles. Candidate must be able to fulfil at least one job role in the bundle.
variables.name: jobRoleBundle

variables.description: Competencies where Competency Category = Job Type
variables.name: jobTypeCompetencies

variables.description: Skills bundle where candidate must have all skills in the bundle
variables.name: skillsANDBundle

variables.description: Skills bundle where candidate must have at least one skill in the bundle
variables.name: skillsORBundle
